evaluation.description: Evaluation questions for the ERDDAP MCP Server. Each question tests multi-tool usage against real ERDDAP data.

question.text: How many griddap datasets are available on CoastWatch West Coast?
question.hint: List all datasets on CoastWatch with protocol=griddap and count the results.

question.text: What variables are in the MUR SST dataset (jplMURSST41) on CoastWatch?
question.hint: Get dataset info for jplMURSST41 on https://coastwatch.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap.

question.text: Find chlorophyll datasets on the NCEI ERDDAP server
What is the time range for NDBC met buoy data on CoastWatch?
question.hint: Get dataset info for cwwcNDBCMet on CoastWatch and look at time_coverage_start/end.

question.text: List all ERDDAP servers focused on the US East Coast
What institution provides the most datasets on IOOS Gliders ERDDAP?
question.hint: List all datasets on https://gliders.ioos.us/erddap and count by institution.

question.text: Get latest SST from MUR SST at lat 37, lon -122
question.hint: Use griddap on jplMURSST41 with time_range=["last","last"], latitude_range=[37,37], longitude_range=[-122,-122].

question.text: What is the spatial coverage of HYCOM on NCEI ERDDAP?
question.hint: Search for HYCOM on NCEI, then get dataset info for the result to see lat/lon ranges.

question.text: Search for wind speed datasets on OSMC
How many tabledap vs griddap datasets are on PacIOOS?
question.hint: List all datasets on PacIOOS with protocol=tabledap, then again with protocol=griddap, and compare counts.
